Trusted Virginia Beach Handyman Service Experts

Handyman Heroes: Done Right, Right Now.

From leaky faucets to full renovations, B & D Handyman Services tackles your toughest jobs. Serving Virginia Beach and surrounding areas with pride.

Family Owned & Operated Industry Certified 16+ Years of Experience 5.0 Rating
5.0 5.0 A+
Verified Reviews

Get a Free Estimate

What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
S
Sarah M.

B & D Handyman Services was fantastic! Our kitchen faucet was leaking badly, and they came out the same day and fixed it quickly and efficiently. The plumber was professional and courteous. Highly recommend!

J
John K.

Our deck needed some serious TLC after the winter. B & D Handyman Services replaced several rotted boards and reinforced the structure. The work was solid, and the price was fair. Would use them again.

M
Maria L.

We hired B & D Handyman Services to paint our living room, and they did an amazing job. The painters were meticulous and paid attention to every detail. The color looks beautiful, and the room feels brand new.

D
David S.

Had a large hole in my drywall from a leaky pipe. B & D Handyman Services patched it perfectly. You can't even tell there was ever any damage. Great service!

Additional Handyman Service Services

General Handyman Services Carpentry Services Painting Services Plumbing Repairs

B & D Handyman Services — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every handyman service project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The B & D Handyman Services Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific handyman service needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Virginia Beach & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout Virginia Beach, VA and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

Virginia Beach Norfolk Chesapeake Portsmouth Suffolk Smithfield Newport News Hampton
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our handyman service services.

What types of handyman services do you offer?

We offer a wide range of services, including carpentry, painting, plumbing, electrical repairs, drywall repair, and more. If you have a specific need, just ask!

How much do your services cost?

The cost of our services varies depending on the scope and complexity of the project. We provide free estimates to ensure you know the cost upfront.

Are you licensed and insured?

Yes, B & D Handyman Services is fully licensed and insured for your protection and peace of mind.

Built on Virginia Beach Values

Let B & D Handyman Services handle your home repairs and improvements. Contact us now to schedule a consultation.

Let's Begin →
